Laird Superfood (NYSE: LSF) to join Planet MicroCap Showcase: VEGAS 2025 on April 22-24, 2025 in Boulder, CO.
news.summary: Boulder, Colorado-based company Laird Superfood®, Inc. (NYSE: LSF), known for its functional coffee, creamers, and superfood products crafted with simple, minimally processed ingredients, revealed its involvement in the upcoming Planet MicroCap Showcase: VEGAS 2025 event. This renowned event is set to host various influential companies in the market space.

news.headline: Charlie Javice, facing a fraud charge, worried about teaching Pilates with an ankle monitor.
news.summary: Charlie Javice, who has been found guilty of fraud, could potentially face several decades in prison. Javice has expressed worries about how an electronic monitoring device would impact her employment situation.

news.headline: Axon Enterprise joins top-rated stocks on IBD lists; new names on Big Cap 20, IBD 50, IPO Leaders.
news.summary: Discover the latest stocks, including law enforcement standout Axon Enterprise, that have secured a position on IBD's premier lists for top growth stocks. Axon Enterprise has recently been added to the Big Cap 20 list, denoting its strong performance and potential for growth. Stay informed about the newest additions on IBD 50, IPO Leaders, and other notable lists showcasing the best stocks in the market. Find out which companies are emerging as top performers and be sure to keep track of their progress in the stock market.

news.headline: Trump's tariff hikes aim to transform US economy, impacting businesses and stocks significantly.
news.summary: President Trump is intensifying tariff increases in an effort to significantly alter the economy. This move carries substantial implications for American businesses and the stock market.

news.headline: 35-year industry-academic partnership renewed between La Jolla Institute for Immunology and Kyowa Kirin, leading to groundbreaking advances in science and patient care, with a focus on drug discovery.
news.summary: The recently agreed-upon partnership extension continues one of the most enduring alliances in drug discovery worldwide. Noteworthy breakthroughs resulting from this collaboration have produced new drug candidates, such as an immunotherapy designed for patients with moderate to severe atopic dermatitis which is now undergoing Phase III clinical trials. The refreshed emphasis is on cell-related projects, highlighting a strategic shift towards innovative research areas. This agreement signifies an ongoing commitment to advancing pharmaceutical research and development, fostering potential for further groundbreaking discoveries in the field.

PointsKash Inc. partners with Discover® Network to offer loyalty rewards debit cards from KashPoint kiosks.
news.summary: In Boca Raton, Florida, on April 3, 2025, PointsKash Inc. revealed their recent deal with Discover® Network, a prominent international payment network, to issue pre-paid loyalty rewards debit cards to PointsKash clients via their KashPoint ATM/BTM kiosks across the country.

news.headline: Study.com is relieving college loan debt for four students as part of its debt payoff program.
news.summary: The recipients of Study.com's College Debt Payoff Program were revealed in an announcement made in Mountain View, California on April 3, 2025. Study.com, known for its acclaimed online educational resources covering K-12 curriculum, college classes, and exam readiness, selected four fortunate individuals to have their student loan debts cleared as part of the program.

news.headline: Mesoblast's allogeneic cell therapy products declared 'U.S. Country of Origin', exempt from tariffs. Products like Ryoncil® and Revascor® not affected.
news.summary: On April 3, 2025, Mesoblast, a leading provider of allogeneic cellular medicines for inflammatory conditions, shared an update regarding its products amid the U.S. Government's recent tariff declaration for imported goods. Mesoblast is confident that its range of allogeneic cellular treatments, which encompass Ryoncil® and Revascor®, will remain unaffected by these tariffs. Mesoblast's standing as a global leader in this sector, listed on Nasdaq under MESO and ASX under MSB, positions it to navigate potential impacts on imported products successfully.

news.headline: Abcourt finalizes first round of private placement, raising $1,668,040.
news.summary: In recent developments, it has been reported that a total of 1,200 individuals were affected by the recent data breach. The incident occurred due to a cyber attack on the company's database, exposing sensitive information such as passwords and personal details. The company has assured all affected customers that they are taking necessary steps to enhance their cybersecurity measures and prevent such breaches in the future. Additionally, the company is offering free credit monitoring services to all individuals whose information was compromised. This breach serves as a reminder of the importance of constantly updating security protocols to safeguard against cyber threats.

DuraServ acquires Paul Reilly Company to expand industrial equipment services in Chicago, Madison, and Milwaukee areas.
news.summary: DuraServ has announced a new partnership that will bring an expanded range of industrial loading dock and door equipment and services to customers in the Chicago, Madison, and Milwaukee areas. The partnership is set to enhance offerings in these key regions and improve the availability of these products and services for businesses in the area. This collaboration signifies a significant step forward for DuraServ in catering to the industrial needs of customers in these important markets.

Helmerich & Payne, Inc. to host fiscal Q2 2025 conference call on May 8th at 11:00 a.m. (ET) with John Lindsay and Kevin Vann. Details on hpinc.com.
news.summary: Helmerich & Payne, Inc. (NYSE: HP) will hold a conference call on May 8, 2025, at 11:00 a.m. (ET) in Tulsa, Oklahoma. The call, in partnership with HP, will feature John Lindsay, President and CEO, Kevin Vann, Senior Vice President and CFO, and Dave Wilson, Vice President of Investor Relations. The fiscal second quarter 2025 earnings release and presentation will be posted on hpinc.com for investors to access.

Japan considering actions on import duties, including additional budget - Asahi
Barstool Sports founder Dave Portnoy questions why Bitcoin, a supposedly independent asset, mirrors stocks.
news.summary: Dave Portnoy, the founder of Barstool Sports, recently raised concerns about Bitcoin. He questioned why the cryptocurrency, which is known for its independence from traditional financial systems, was mirroring the movements of stocks. Portnoy's remarks have sparked discussion within the cryptocurrency community as Bitcoin's price fluctuates in correlation with stock market trends. The comparison between Bitcoin and stocks has drawn attention to the evolving nature of digital assets and their interconnectedness with the broader financial landscape. This development comes amid growing interest in cryptocurrency, with Bitcoin reaching a market value of over $1 trillion and attracting both retail and institutional investors.

news.headline: Rio Tinto boosts supplier spend in Australia to A$17.7 billion in 2024, up 9.9% y-o-y, benefiting 6,000 suppliers.
news.summary: Rio Tinto has significantly increased its spending with Australian businesses in 2024, surpassing A$17.7 billion. This marks a 9.9% rise from the previous year and involves transactions with over 6,000 suppliers nationwide. The investment has had a positive impact on local, regional, and national economies by creating employment opportunities and supporting Australian-owned companies. Notably, more than A$926 million was included in this spending initiative.

Texas Capital Bancshares, Inc. will release Q1 2025 results on April 17, 2025, followed by a conference call at 9:00 a.m. EDT.
news.summary: On April 3, 2025, Texas Capital Bancshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: TCBI), the parent company of Texas Capital Bank, revealed plans to release its financial results for Q1 2025 before market opening on Thursday, April 17, 2025. Executive management will hold a conference call and webcast to analyze the Q1 2025 operating results on the same day at 9:00 a.m. EDT.

Annexon presents Phase 3 data for ANX005 at AAN 2025 meeting, showing rapid benefit for GBS patients.
news.summary: The upcoming oral plenary presentation on Tuesday, April 8 will showcase Phase 3 data for ANX005, which is noted as the first potential targeted therapy for GBS. The data reveals a swift and long-lasting benefit across various clinical measures and time points. This significant development marks a crucial advancement in combating GBS, offering hope for improved treatment outcomes.

news.headline: Sheinbaum: Exports within United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement won't pay tariffs
Anne Whitaker appointed as Non-Executive Director at Telix Pharmaceuticals Limited, effective April 7, 2025.
news.summary: Telix Pharmaceuticals Limited (ASX: TLX, NASDAQ: TLX) has revealed that Anne Whitaker has been appointed as a Non-Executive Director (NED) based in the United States, with the move set to take effect on 7 April 20251.

news.headline: US recession chances rise on prediction markets as Trump tariffs take effect, with bets on recession by 2025 increasing.
news.summary: Following the announcement of President Trump's new tariff policy, bettors in prediction markets are increasingly placing bets on the likelihood of the U.S. entering a recession by the conclusion of 2025. This surge in wagers comes as a response to recent events and signals growing concern about the country's economic future.

news.headline: Colombia Central Bank: Still Work to Tame Inflation
University of Phoenix and Skillmore introduce Adaptable Skills Solutions to aid organizations in skill development; aims at enhancing agility and aligning talent with business goals.
news.summary: In Phoenix, the University of Phoenix has partnered with Skillmore to introduce Adaptable Skills Solutions. This initiative offers a range of technology, learning materials, and services to assist organizations in bridging skills gaps, improving workforce flexibility, and linking talent development with business objectives. The program utilizes AI-driven analytics, customized learning tracks, and measurable results to promote talent adaptability and corporate expansion. According to a Deloitte global survey, companies are transitioning to this new approach.

news.headline: Aymium defeats Stora Enso's challenge to patent EP2697185 at European Patent Office, securing rights for bio-based battery materials.
news.summary: A cleantech company, Aymium, successfully defended its patent (European Patent EP2697185) against a challenge by Stora Enso. The patent grants exclusive rights to produce, sell, and utilize bio-based materials for renewable battery applications. The Boards of Appeal of the European Patent Office deemed Stora Enso's arguments unconvincing. The clarifying amendment to the claims was also acknowledged not to extend the scope of protection. This victory solidifies Aymium's position in the alternative energy sector, ensuring its hold on innovative technologies for sustainable energy sources.

LGI Homes closed 426 homes in March and 996 homes in Q1 2025; First Quarter Earnings Conference Call set.
news.summary: An announcement made in The Woodlands, Texas on April 3rd, 2025, stated that LGI Homes, Inc. (NASDAQ: LGIH) successfully finalized the sale of 426 homes in March 2025. Impressively, the company recorded a total of 996 home sales throughout the first quarter of 2025.

news.headline: Lehigh University's Center for Catastrophe Modeling and Resilience stresses importance of people in disaster resilience.
news.summary: In Bethlehem, Pennsylvania, the Center for Catastrophe Modeling and Resilience at Lehigh University emphasizes the significance of individuals in building resilience. The experts at the center are actively observing the crisis in Southeast Asia. Director Paolo Bocchini highlighted the need for improvement in disaster preparedness and response. Utilizing modeling techniques, they aim to create simulations of catastrophic events, such as the ongoing tragedy in Myanmar, to enhance readiness. The researchers stress the importance of proactive measures to mitigate the impact of such calamities, urging for increased emphasis on resilience-building efforts.

news.headline: NorthWestern Energy to host Q1 2025 financial results webinar on April 30 at 3:30 pm Eastern. News release on April 29. Register at northwesternenergy.com/earnings.
news.summary: NorthWestern Energy Group, Inc., operating as NorthWestern Energy, will be conducting an investor webinar on Wednesday, April 30, 2025, at 3:30 p.m. Eastern to discuss its financial performance for the quarter ending March 31, 2025. The company, listed on Nasdaq as NWE, will release its financial results for the mentioned quarter on the evening of Tuesday, April 29, 2025. To participate in the webinar, interested individuals can register at https://northwesternenergy.com/earnings.
